projectDescription: Skult is a B2G sales intelligence platform that detects public sector buying signals from municipal deliberations, budgets, and meeting minutes — 6 to 18 months before official tender publication.
keyFeatures: Real-time buying signal detection from 35,000+ French local government sources
Custom AI agents calibrated per industry vertical and target geography
Verified decision-maker contact enrichment (email, phone, LinkedIn)
Opportunity scoring on a 10-point scale with natural language justification
CRM integrations (HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Sellsy, Attio, Zoho, Odoo)
MCP server for AI agent access to alerts, contacts, and pipeline data
Go/No-Go AI analysis of procurement documents (CCTP/RC)
Contract expiry radar for upcoming renewals (6–12 month horizon)
Public procurement explorer powered by DECP (data.gouv.fr)
Competitor market analysis via SIRET/company name lookup
publicApiSurface: MCP tool: get_alerts (list alerts with filters)
MCP tool: get_alert_detail (full alert details with verbatim, contacts, notes)
MCP tool: get_pipeline_stats (pipeline overview by status)
MCP tool: add_alert_note (add dated note to alert)
